---
title: "Digital Data Collection Tools - KoboCollect"
subtitle: "Getting Started"
date: 2025-08-27
---


### Schedule

| Time | Activity | Facilitator |
| ---- | -------- | ----------- |
| 8:00 – 10:00 AM | Introduction to Kobo | Henry Kissinger |
| | Setting up Kobo | |
| | Building forms | |
| | Managing forms | |
| | Analyzing data | |
| | Offline data collection | |
| 4:00 – 5:00 PM | Practicals | Mentors |

### Materials 

[Download zip](/materials/workshop_1/day-3/day_3.zip){.btn .btn-secondary}

### Reference Document

<iframe src="/materials/workshop_1/day-3/Kobocollect%20Training%20Manual.pdf" width="100%" height="600px" style="border: none;"></iframe>

[Download PDF](/materials/workshop_1/day-3/Kobocollect%20Training%20Manual.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary}


### Video Recordings
{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VIDEO_ID >}}
